head.Unnamed: 1: Bench. Full ROM, elbows 45°. Primary chest builder.
45° bench angle. Hits upper chest for V-taper.
Slow eccentric 3 sec. KEY for shoulder width.
Core braced. Don't flare elbows excessively.
Elbows fixed. Full extension. Triceps = 2/3 of arm.
Long head stretch. Arms bigger from behind.
3×1 min. Hands up. Exhale each punch.

head.Unnamed: 1: V-taper KING. Band assist if needed.

Supinated grip. Full ROM, no swinging.

Legs + Abs A — Quads, Glutes, Core

head.Unnamed: 1: Hold DB at chest. Full depth. Knees track toes.
Hinge at hips. Hamstring stretch. HUGE for glutes.
Stepping back. Less knee stress than forward lunge.
Band above knees. Activates glute med for width.
Wide stance. Inner quad and adductor focus.
Slow controlled. BEST core exercise you own.

head.Unnamed: 1: Rotation hits all 3 delt heads. V-taper essential.
4 sec negative. Most important exercise for width.
Elevated feet shift load to upper chest.
Lower chest definition. Decline on bench.
Long head stretch. Width to arms.

head.💪 Push Day — Session Log: Progressive overload rule: If you complete ALL reps of ALL sets, INCREASE the weight by 1–2.5 kg next session.

head.Unnamed: 1: Widest grip comfortable. Creates V-taper back.
Neutral grip. Retract scapula. Mid-back thickness.
Knee on bench. Full ROM. Heavy is okay here.
Traps for that athletic look. Hold at top 1 sec.
Arm health, rear delt, external rotators.
On bench 60°. Long head bicep. Peak builder.
Elbow on inner thigh. Mind-muscle maximum.
